validator_prompt: Review whether the report combines the previously agreed approval-gated development workflow, the new frontend interaction-prototype workflow, and general software development lifecycle practices into a reusable process.

architect_review.summary: The report defines a reusable staged workflow from idea intake through research, approval, frontend interaction prototyping, page/API/data-contract planning, implementation, verification, and acceptance. It preserves product-manager approval gates and small task nodes.
